Interface MessageQueue

All Superinterfaces:
Remote
All Known Implementing Classes:
RMIMessageQueue, TCPMessageQueue
public interface MessageQueue extends Remote
Represents a message queue that can be used to enqueue and dequeue messages. This interface extends Remote to allow for remote method invocation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Message
    dequeue()
    Dequeues a message from the queue.
    boolean
    enqueue(Message message)
    Enqueues a message to the queue.

  • Method Details

    • enqueue

      boolean enqueue(Message message) throws RemoteException
      Enqueues a message to the queue.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to be enqueued.
      Returns:
      true if the message was successfully enqueued, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a remote communication error occurs.

    • dequeue

      Message dequeue() throws RemoteException
      Dequeues a message from the queue.
      Returns:
      The dequeued message.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if a remote communication error occurs.
